findings.title: North Star Metric: Dashboard Load Time
findings.description: The North Star metric for PageSpeed is the p95 load time of the dashboard, as it directly impacts user experience and satisfaction. A reduction in load time is critical for retaining users and reducing support tickets related to performance.
assumptions: Users prioritize dashboard performance for their overall satisfaction.

evidence.excerpt: Dashboard load time regressed from 1.2s to 4.8s after v3.2 deploy.

recommendations: Monitor p95 load time continuously and aim to reduce it back to baseline of 1200ms.

metadata.measurement_method: Continuous monitoring of dashboard load time

findings.title: Primary KPI: API p95 Latency
findings.description: The p95 latency of the API is a primary KPI that affects the overall performance of the platform. It should be monitored closely to ensure that it remains within acceptable limits.
assumptions: API performance directly influences user experience.
recommendations: Aim to reduce API p95 latency to baseline of 120ms.

findings.title: Guardrail Metric: Error Rate Percentage
findings.description: The error rate percentage is a guardrail metric that must not degrade. A high error rate can lead to user dissatisfaction and increased support tickets.
assumptions: Low error rates are essential for maintaining user trust.
recommendations: Ensure error rate does not exceed baseline of 0.4%.

findings.title: Measurement Gap: Customer Support Ticket Analysis
findings.description: There is a gap in the analysis of customer support tickets related to performance issues. A deeper understanding of ticket trends can help identify root causes of user dissatisfaction.
assumptions: Understanding support ticket trends can inform product improvements.

evidence.excerpt: Customer support tickets last 7 days increased to 89.

recommendations: Implement a detailed analysis of support tickets to identify common issues.

findings.title: Implement Performance Regression Detection
findings.description: To prevent future regressions, implement automated performance benchmarking in the CI pipeline that compares against baseline metrics.
assumptions: Automated testing can catch performance issues before deployment.

evidence.excerpt: Implement performance regression detection in CI pipeline.

recommendations: Develop a benchmark suite that runs on every PR.

summary: The analysis identifies critical metrics and gaps in the PageSpeed product's performance monitoring framework. The North Star metric is the p95 dashboard load time, with primary KPIs including API latency and guardrail metrics for error rates. Recommendations include implementing automated performance regression detection and analyzing customer support tickets for deeper insights.
